input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.3
            TITLE: black flag with orange dot - pull into the driver change area for a mechanical inspection,

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.3: Black Flag with Orange Dot - Pull into the Driver Change Area for a mechanical inspection,
D.4.1.3 Black Flag with Orange Dot - Pull into the Driver Change Area for a mechanical inspection, 
something has been observed that needs closer inspection.

final_answer: Black Flag with Orange Dot - Pull into the Driver Change Area for a mechanical inspection, something has been observed that needs closer inspection.
